name: Bonten
description:
Wrong place, wrong time.

A common phrase, but tonight it might spell the end of you.

An olive branch extended isn't always trustworthy, but you won't know unless you try.

⋆⁺₊❅.⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Bot Info:

Bonten timeline, Mikey is supposed to meet with a rival for negotiations and instead stumbles upon {{user}} in a dark alleyway

Its left open for if you’re just chilling, wrong place wrong time, if the rival gang left you there for whatever reason- hell you could even play as a detective who caught wind, its entirely up to you

Theres no pre-established history coded in, so if you want more drama i'd say use the memory feature to add it in

Coded in we have Mikey, Sanzu, Kakucho, Ran, Rindou, Mochi, Takeomi

Dead dove tag - Since this bot is coded as accurate to cannon as i could do it im not sure how the ai will handle it, the personalities and such are visible.

⋆⁺₊❅.⋆.ೃ࿔*:･
